intro.text: I am Draco, last of the Gym Leaders. My dragons have ended the dreams of a thousand challengers. Will you be one thousand and one, or will you be the one who breaks through?

win.text: By the ancient wyrms... you did it. The Dragon Badge is yours. You have bested all eight of us. The Elite Four awaits - if you dare.

lose.text: Dragon fire burns the unworthy. You are not ready for what lies beyond. Return when your spirit can match a dragon's.
